name: Skillet Hamburger Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 Oz. Can Cut Green Beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the beef, celery, and onion until the meat is browned and the vegetables are crisp-tender. Use an electric skillet set to 350°F (175°C).
2. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, green beans, gravy, and water to cover. Reduce heat to 220°F (100°C) and simmer to blend flavors.
3. Whisk together instant mashed potatoes and boiling water. Add sour cream, chives, and remaining salt. Mix until smooth.
4. Spoon the potato mixture into mounds over the meat in a baking dish.
5. Top with paprika and shredded cheese. Cover with foil.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the cheese melts, about 20-25 minutes.
This recipe was adapted from an old Better Homes and Gardens "Easy Skillet Meals" cookbook. For added flavor, use white pepper, garlic salt, and minced garlic if available. Enjoy!
